papers.title: RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control
papers.summary: A vision-language-action model that transfers web-scale semantic knowledge into robot control policies, enabling generalization to novel objects and instructions.

papers.title: Diffusion Policy: Visuomotor Policy Learning via Action Diffusion
papers.summary: Uses diffusion models for multimodal action generation in visuomotor imitation learning, achieving state-of-the-art results across multiple manipulation benchmarks.

papers.title: Open X-Embodiment: Robotic Learning Datasets and RT-X Models
papers.summary: Introduces a large cross-embodiment robotics dataset spanning 22 robot embodiments and demonstrates RT-X models for transferable robot policies.

papers.title: Action Chunking with Transformers: Learning Fine-Grained Manipulation
papers.summary: Proposes ACT, a transformer-based policy that predicts action chunks for fine-grained bimanual manipulation tasks with impressive real-world results.

papers.title: RT-1: Robotics Transformer for Real-World Control at Scale
papers.summary: A transformer-based architecture for robot control trained on a large real-world dataset of 130k episodes across 700+ tasks.

papers.title: Mobile ALOHA: Learning Bimanual Mobile Manipulation with Low-Cost Whole-Body Teleoperation
papers.summary: A low-cost whole-body teleoperation system for learning bimanual mobile manipulation tasks, achieving impressive results with just 50 demonstrations per task.

papers.title: ALOHA Unleashed: A Simple Recipe for Robot Dexterity
papers.summary: Scales up the ALOHA system with improved policies and demonstrates highly dexterous manipulation skills including tying shoelaces and hanging shirts.

papers.title: Eureka: Human-Level Reward Design via Coding Large Language Models
papers.summary: Uses LLMs to automatically generate reward functions for RL, achieving human-level performance on dexterous manipulation tasks including pen spinning.

papers.title: DrEureka: Language Model Guided Sim-To-Real Transfer
papers.summary: Extends Eureka to automate sim-to-real transfer by using LLMs to generate domain randomization parameters and reward functions for zero-shot transfer.

papers.title: Octo: An Open-Source Generalist Robot Policy
papers.summary: An open-source, large transformer-based generalist robot policy trained on the Open X-Embodiment dataset, supporting multiple robot embodiments and tasks.

papers.title: 3D Diffuser Actor: Policy Diffusion with 3D Scene Representations
papers.summary: Combines 3D scene representations with diffusion-based policy learning for robot manipulation, achieving strong results on RLBench and real-world tasks.

papers.title: SIMPLER: A Simple Baseline for Real-World Robot Manipulation
papers.summary: Establishes strong baselines for real-world robot manipulation by systematically evaluating design choices in policy architecture, data collection, and training.
